| [0001](0001-fk-policy.md) | Foreign-Key Policy: snapshot-by-reference, not referential joins | Accepted | 2026-07-01 |
| [0002](0002-transactional-outbox.md) | Transactional outbox + polling relay over message brokers | Accepted | — |
| [0003](0003-dual-runtime-adapters.md) | Dual runtime — in-memory and Postgres adapters behind one port | Accepted | — |
| [0004](0004-no-module-imports.md) | No module-to-module imports; cross-module behavior via events only | Accepted | — |
| [0005](0005-single-ai-seam.md) | Single AI provider seam with deterministic local fallback | Accepted | — |
| [0006](0006-forms-are-json.md) | Form schemas are pure JSON; behavior referenced by registry id | Accepted | — |
| [0007](0007-formula-engine-no-eval.md) | Hand-rolled formula engine; no eval; cycles rejected at compile | Accepted | — |
| [0008](0008-createdrawer-frozen-adapter.md) | Freeze the CreateDrawer props API as an adapter over the form engine | Accepted | — |
| [0009](0009-rest-first.md) | REST-first; GraphQL deferred until integrator demand | Accepted | — |
| [0010](0010-rls-authored-early-enforced-last.md) | RLS policies authored with tables; enforcement is the final pre-production task | Accepted | — |
| [0011](0011-aggregate-contract-platform-composition.md) | AURA Aggregate Contract & Platform Composition | Accepted | — |
| [0012](0012-shared-dimensions.md) | Shared Dimensions | Accepted | — |
| [0013](0013-export-first-bi.md) | Export-first BI (no embedded BI lock-in) | Accepted | — |
| [0014](0014-css-token-design-system.md) | Design system on CSS custom properties; no UI framework dependency | Accepted | — |
| [0015](0015-crm-email-ms-graph.md) | CRM email integration via Microsoft Graph | Accepted | 2026-07-01 |
| [0016](0016-metadata-designer-sequence.md) | Metadata designer sequencing - forms, then list views, dashboards, custom entities | Accepted | 2026-07-03 |
